title: Amity University is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Amity University is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Amity University. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Subject Matter Expert to strengthen our Navi Mumbai-based team.

About Amity University:
Amity University is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Amity University!
